evals.prompt: I just signed a new client — Samir's Indian Kitchen in Gurugram. They're a mid-range North Indian restaurant with 2 locations. Do a full market research before I start their Meta and Google campaigns. Here's their website: samirskitchen.com
evals.expected_output: Should generate a Perplexity mega-prompt covering all 11 dimensions for the restaurant industry in Gurugram. Should include Porter's, PESTEL, SWOT, Blue Ocean frameworks. After Perplexity data is provided, should produce markdown report + HTML dashboard with Chart.js visualizations and restaurant-appropriate branding.

assertions.name: generates_perplexity_prompt
assertions.description: Output includes a customized Perplexity deep research prompt covering all 11 dimensions

assertions.name: local_market_customization
assertions.description: Perplexity prompt includes Gurugram/NCR specific market questions, not generic India-wide

assertions.name: catchment_radius_appropriate
assertions.description: Uses 5-10km catchment radius appropriate for a restaurant, not 50km+

assertions.name: both_platforms_covered
assertions.description: Research dimensions include both Meta Ads AND Google Ads benchmarks since client needs both

assertions.name: porters_five_forces_included
assertions.description: Perplexity prompt includes Porter's Five Forces analysis for restaurant industry

assertions.name: pestel_included
assertions.description: Perplexity prompt includes PESTEL analysis with India-specific factors

assertions.name: swot_included
assertions.description: Perplexity prompt includes SWOT analysis framework

assertions.name: blue_ocean_included
assertions.description: Perplexity prompt includes Blue Ocean / underserved market opportunities

assertions.name: buyer_personas_included
assertions.description: Perplexity prompt requests buyer personas with purchase journey and objection handling

assertions.name: keyword_data_step_present
assertions.description: Skill asks about collecting Google Ads Keyword Planner and/or Meta Ads data

evals.prompt: My existing client Thrive Retreats in Kingscliff NSW just launched a new product — Thrive Flow Teacher Training. It's a yoga teacher training certification. I need fresh market research for this specific product before building the campaign. Website: thriveretreats.com.au. They only need Meta Ads.
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this is an existing client with a new product launch. Perplexity prompt should cover all 11 dimensions focused on yoga teacher training market in Australia/NSW. Platform focus should be Meta Ads only, not Google Ads.

assertions.name: recognizes_existing_client_new_product
assertions.description: Acknowledges this is an existing client and focuses research on the new product, not the entire business

assertions.name: industry_specific_dimensions
assertions.description: Research covers yoga/wellness education market specifics — certification requirements, enrollment cycles, trust signals

assertions.name: audience_psychology_depth
assertions.description: Buyer personas section goes beyond demographics into decision triggers, objections, and emotional drivers specific to yoga teacher training seekers

assertions.name: meta_only_platform_focus
assertions.description: Platform benchmarks focused on Meta Ads (CPM, ROAS, creative formats), not Google Ads

assertions.name: all_11_dimensions_in_prompt
assertions.description: Perplexity prompt covers all 11 dimensions including Porter's, PESTEL, SWOT, Blue Ocean

evals.prompt: New B2B client — TechServe Solutions, an IT managed services company in Melbourne. Website: techserve.com.au. They want both Google and Meta Ads. Here's the Perplexity deep research output: [see evals/mock-perplexity-output.md]
evals.expected_output: Should analyze Perplexity output end-to-end across all 11 dimensions. Produce markdown report with source labels, confidence ratings, marketing implications per section. HTML dashboard with Chart.js charts, tooltips, collapsibles, and CrownTECH branding.

assertions.name: source_labels_present
assertions.description: Every data point in the report has [EXTRACTED] or [INFERRED] label

assertions.name: blank_fields_with_reasons
assertions.description: Missing data appears as BLANK with one-sentence explanation, not filled with guesses

assertions.name: confidence_ratings_per_section
assertions.description: Each of the 11 sections has HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW confidence rating

assertions.name: brand_extraction_attempted
assertions.description: Dashboard uses colors/fonts extracted from client website via extract_brand.py, not defaults

assertions.name: marketing_implications_per_section
assertions.description: Every dimension section ends with Marketing Implications connecting findings to campaign decisions

assertions.name: recommendation_labels
assertions.description: Strategic recommendations labeled 'data-supported' or 'directional'

assertions.name: chartjs_visualizations
assertions.description: HTML dashboard uses Chart.js for data visualization (radar for Porter's, bar for market size, doughnut for budget)

assertions.name: tooltips_on_kpis
assertions.description: Dashboard has tooltips on every KPI and stat explaining context and source

assertions.name: collapsible_sections
assertions.description: Dashboard uses collapsible sections for detailed sub-content

assertions.name: keyword_data_integrated
assertions.description: If Google Ads keyword CSV was provided, data is embedded in the Keywords section of the dashboard

assertions.name: porters_pestel_swot_present
assertions.description: Dashboard includes Porter's Five Forces (radar chart), PESTEL (6 cards), and SWOT (2x2 grid) visualizations

assertions.name: both_outputs_generated
assertions.description: Both markdown report AND HTML dashboard are produced and saved to deliverables/

assertions.name: wiki_updated
assertions.description: Client wiki pages updated with findings, sources saved to sources/ folder

evals.prompt: New client — Smith & Associates, a commercial law firm in Sydney. Website: smithlaw.com.au. They want Google Ads only. Known competitors: Clayton Utz, Herbert Smith Freehills.
evals.expected_output: Should seed competitor names into the Perplexity prompt. Platform focus Google Ads only. All 11 dimensions customized for legal services industry in Sydney. Should ask about Google Ads Keyword Planner data collection.

assertions.name: competitor_names_seeded
assertions.description: Perplexity prompt includes the known competitor names (Clayton Utz, Herbert Smith Freehills)

assertions.name: google_only_focus
assertions.description: Platform benchmarks focused on Google Ads (CPC, CTR, CPL), Meta benchmarks excluded or minimal

assertions.name: legal_industry_specifics
assertions.description: Research dimensions include legal-specific factors: compliance, bar association, ethical advertising rules

assertions.name: sydney_geographic_scope
assertions.description: Geographic scope is Sydney/NSW specific, not generic Australia-wide

assertions.name: keyword_collection_step
assertions.description: Skill mentions collecting Google Ads Keyword Planner data (Chrome tools or CSV export)

evals.prompt: Perplexity research for GreenLeaf Organics, organic grocery delivery in Bangalore. Perplexity output attached but missing: Porter's analysis, PESTEL, and channel partners data. Only 8 of 11 dimensions have data.
evals.expected_output: Should mark Porter's, PESTEL, and channel partners as BLANK with reasons. Generate targeted follow-up queries for the 3 missing dimensions. Proceed with available data for the other 8 dimensions. Report shows confidence ratings LOW for missing sections. Maximum 2 follow-up rounds before proceeding with gaps.

assertions.name: blank_dimensions_marked
assertions.description: Porter's, PESTEL, and channel partners sections marked BLANK with one-sentence explanation each — not filled with guesses

assertions.name: follow_up_queries_generated
assertions.description: 1-2 targeted follow-up Perplexity queries generated specifically for the 3 missing dimensions

assertions.name: confidence_ratings_reflect_gaps
assertions.description: Confidence ratings for Porter's, PESTEL, and channel partners set to LOW — not MEDIUM or HIGH

assertions.name: report_proceeds_with_available_data
assertions.description: Report and dashboard still produced with the 8 available dimensions — does not block on missing data

assertions.name: max_two_followup_rounds
assertions.description: Follow-up protocol respects the 2-round maximum — after 2 rounds, proceeds with gaps marked BLANK

evals.prompt: Research for Elite Tutors, premium home tutoring service in Delhi NCR. Google Ads only. Known competitors: Vedantu, BYJU's tuition, Superprof India.
evals.expected_output: Perplexity prompt should explicitly include dimension 9 (Channel Partners & Referral Ecosystem). Analysis covers referral sources specific to tutoring: school partnerships, parent community groups, education consultants, relocation services. Google Ads-only platform focus.

assertions.name: channel_partners_in_prompt
assertions.description: Perplexity prompt includes dimension 9 — channel partners and referral ecosystem — with tutoring-specific referral questions

assertions.name: referral_sources_identified
assertions.description: Analysis identifies at least 3 distinct referral source categories relevant to home tutoring

assertions.name: school_partnership_angle
assertions.description: School partnerships explicitly explored as a channel partner opportunity for premium tutoring

assertions.name: parent_community_channels
assertions.description: Parent community groups (WhatsApp groups, RWA communities, school parent networks) identified as referral channels

assertions.name: education_consultant_referrals
assertions.description: Education consultants and relocation services explored as referral sources for premium tutoring in Delhi NCR
